mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_issue t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.issue_date DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_issue WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_issue t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.department = #{department} ORDER BY t.issue_date DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_issue WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND department = #{department}
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_issue t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.status = #{status} ORDER BY t.issue_date DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_issue WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = #{status}

SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_issue t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND (t.worker_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR t.emp_id LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR t.item_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') ORDER BY t.issue_date DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_issue WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (worker_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR emp_id LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR item_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_issue t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ppe_issue ( issue_date, worker_name, emp_id, department, item_id, item_name, quantity, issue_reason, return_date, status, signed, signature_image, note, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{issueDate}, #{workerName}, #{empId}, #{department}, #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{quantity}, #{issueReason}, #{returnDate}, #{status}, #{signed}, #{signatureImage}, #{note}, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ppe_issue SET issue_date = #{issueDate}, worker_name = #{workerName}, emp_id = #{empId}, department = #{department}, item_id = #{itemId}, item_name = #{itemName}, quantity = #{quantity}, issue_reason = #{issueReason}, return_date = #{returnDate}, status = #{status}, signed = #{signed}, signature_image = #{signatureImage}, note = #{note}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_issue SET status = #{status}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_issue SET is_deleted = 1, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
